Package com.aispect.api

Interface AiClient

All Known Implementing Classes:
GeminiAdapter, LlamaCppAdapter, OllamaAdapter, OpenAiAdapter
public interface AiClient
AI Client adapter interface.

This interface defines the standard contract for communicating with underlying AI model services. It abstracts various specific AI model APIs (e.g., OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, Llama.cpp) into unified methods, enabling upper-layer engines and agents to focus on logic rather than underlying network communications and protocol differences.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Response
    generate(PromptContext ctx, AiClientConfig config)
    Generates a single response in a blocking manner.
    Stream<Response>
    streamGenerate(PromptContext ctx, AiClientConfig config)
    Generates a response via streaming (Server-Sent Events mode).

  • Method Details

    • generate

      Response generate(PromptContext ctx, AiClientConfig config) throws AiSpectException
      Generates a single response in a blocking manner.

      The client will send the prompt context to the underlying AI model and wait for the complete calculation result. Applicable for non-streaming scenarios where the final result is needed all at once.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The prompt context of the current request, including system prompts, historical messages, etc.
      config - Configuration parameters for the client request, such as model name, temperature, max tokens, etc.
      Returns:
      The complete response generated by the model Response
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Thrown when a network request fails, times out, or the model service returns an abnormal status code

    • streamGenerate

      Stream<Response> streamGenerate(PromptContext ctx, AiClientConfig config) throws AiSpectException
      Generates a response via streaming (Server-Sent Events mode).

      The client will continuously receive partial generation results from the model as a stream, terminating the stream when the model finishes generating or the connection is interrupted. Applicable for chat applications or long text generation scenarios that require a real-time "typewriter" output experience.

      Parameters:
      ctx - The prompt context of the current request, including system prompts, historical messages, etc.
      config - Configuration parameters for the client request (ensure stream=true is declared)
      Returns:
      A sequential stream containing Response chunks, automatically closed when the terminator is received
      Throws:
      AiSpectException - Thrown when a streaming request fails to initialize or a connection error occurs
